exercises.title: Almost there
exercises.body: Every letter you need is now in your toolkit. This round mixes everything together — take your time.

exercises.caption: Sound it out — what does this say?
Two syllables — take it slowly. What does this say?
Build this word from Shavian letters

exercises.title: One letter, one job
exercises.body: English makes 26 letters cover far more than 26 sounds — c does double duty for “cat” and “cell”, gh sits silent in “night”. Every Shavian letter you have met means exactly one sound, every time. You can read 34 of the 48 letters now — Chapter 2 hands you the rest.
